disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I just read a text from my finance director with awful news:
| | |
---
Friend, I apologize for being so blunt, but I just read a text from my finance director with awful news: I fell just $9,561 short of my most crucial End of Quarter fundraising goal.
When I miss my important goals, I risk my chance of winning in Florida – particularly since Marco Rubio just hauled $4 million last quarter (his best few months of fundraising in his whole career).
So here’s what I’m seeing, friend: Marco Rubio and the Republican establishment are going to keep raising huge sums of money. They're already attacking me, and they'll keep attacking me. **That's why I cannot lose any ground – not when Florida's last Senate race was decided by only 10,033 votes. So I asked my team to pull your supporter record, and here's what I saw:**
| | **SUPPORTER RECORD**
---
Supporter: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
Deadline: **11:59 p.m.**
End of Quarter donation: **PENDING**
---

---
[**Friend, can I count on you to chip in $5, $25 or more to make up this fundraising shortfall, flip Florida blue and defeat Marco Rubio? Every dollar goes directly to defending our Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40269879/323574907/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2018-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2I5MmNjZS0wYjZiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pmxy58cVIWHp974h3CjDV2C39p4OcF5Xf25AVgRMlqI=)
I'm not exaggerating when I say 2022 is a tipping point that could determine our country's future. Voting rights. Pandemic recovery. These and other vital issues hinge on expanding our Senate majority – and Roll Call is reporting that Florida is one of the states that will determine Senate control next year.

With Marco Rubio having a record fundraising quarter while we're falling short of our grassroots goals, I'm worried we'll have to make some difficult decisions like pulling back ads or our voter registration efforts. I know engaged supporters like you don't want to see that happen.
**But we're looking at a pretty hefty deficit of $9,561.[Will you please rush a few dollars right now to help us close this shortfall and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40269880/323574908/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2018-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2I5MmNjZS0wYjZiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pmxy58cVIWHp974h3CjDV2C39p4OcF5Xf25AVgRMlqI=)**
| | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40269881/323574909/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2018-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2I5MmNjZS0wYjZiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pmxy58cVIWHp974h3CjDV2C39p4OcF5Xf25AVgRMlqI=)
---
Thank you for joining in this fight.

Congresswoman Val Demings
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40269882/323574910/1581265324?refcode=jtk2018-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2I5MmNjZS0wYjZiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pmxy58cVIWHp974h3CjDV2C39p4OcF5Xf25AVgRMlqI=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. So here’s what I’m seeing, friend: Marco Rubio and the Republican establishment are going to keep raising huge sums of money. They're already attacking me, and they'll keep attacking me. That's why I cannot lose any ground – not when Florida's last Senate race was decided by only 10,033 votes. So I asked my team to pull your supporter record, and here's what I saw: | | SUPPORTER RECORD Supporter: dpwillis67@gmail.com Deadline: 11:59 p.m. End of Quarter donation: PENDING | | = = I'm not exaggerating when I say 2022 is a tipping point that could determine our country's future. name: Kevin Hern
subject: Happy New Year!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
We have reason for hope in 2022. Read more >>
| | |
---
Happy New Year, Peter! We have more reason than ever to be hopeful as we head into another new year. There is a red wave sweeping the nation, as Americans are getting FED UP with Biden’s socialist agenda. Our base is fired up and if we work hard to reach out to our neighbors and get out the vote in the midterm elections in November, I have no doubt that we’ll have a new REPUBLICAN majority in the House of Representatives by the end of the year. It’s been a tough couple of years for almost all of us. But there is light on the horizon in 2022. To a bright and shining year to come,
Kevin Hern
---

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: my New Year’s resolution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40273390/323586734/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDQzZDg4MC0xMzZiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZW0QrdDQOn7vLYxbtkwFFLx4LL22BPdaL74t3JdAgQ0=&emci=5c34cb31-746a-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&emdi=3443d880-136b-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40273391/323586735/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDQzZDg4MC0xMzZiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZW0QrdDQOn7vLYxbtkwFFLx4LL22BPdaL74t3JdAgQ0=&emci=5c34cb31-746a-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&emdi=3443d880-136b-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
Last night, we conquered our first end-of-quarter FEC deadline. It was the biggest and most important deadline of our campaign to defeat Chuck Grassley so far. **I’m happy to report that, with the help of grassroots donors like you, we smashed our $100,000 goal! Thank you.**
I’m running for Senate because our nation needs a Senate that works for everyone, especially the next generation.
I’m running for Senate because we need quality healthcare for everyone, the type of healthcare I received as a three-star Admiral in the military.
I’m running for Senate because we have become immune to logic in addressing gun violence. Gun ownership must require a higher level of responsibility and the NRA's blood money needs to be called out. Enough is enough.
I’m running for Senate because climate change is real, it’s existential, and we must take more action now before it is too late.
I’m running for Senate because politicians, like my opponent Chuck Grassley, have been sullied by special interests. I don’t take money from corporate PACs because a people-powered campaign will always be stronger than Super PACs and their dark money. Sign me up for real campaign finance reform.
And I’m running for Senate because our very democracy is at stake. From insurrectionists and the Big Lie to coordinated attacks on the right to vote, we are in a battle for the future of our republic.
When then-Iowa House member Chuck Grassley was asked, “Why are you running for the U.S. House,” almost fifty years ago today, he responded, “Because I think I can win.” We need less of that – win at all costs – and more of ‘get it done.’
**That’s why my New Year’s resolution this year is simple: Ending Chuck Grassley’s 46-year career in Washington once and for all. I will be the Senator for all of Iowa.**
I am so grateful that you are a part of this campaign, because I know that together we can turn Iowa blue and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate.
Let’s make it so,
Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)
[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40273392/323586737/-42398318?refcode=20220101am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDQzZDg4MC0xMzZiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZW0QrdDQOn7vLYxbtkwFFLx4LL22BPdaL74t3JdAgQ0=)
Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
PO Box 13401
Des Moines, IA 50310
United States
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/5c34cb31-746a-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e/3443d880-136b-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDQzZDg4MC0xMzZiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZW0QrdDQOn7vLYxbtkwFFLx4LL22BPdaL74t3JdAgQ0=&id=108479969).

VICE ADMIRAL FRANKEN (RET) IS A FORMER MEMBER OF THE U.S. NAVY. USE OF HIS MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES, AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE.

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Happy New Year!
body:
I wanted to thank you for your constant support and dedication to the conservative movement this past year.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ifOk2sHBd2f0zMYQUryLP9KalplPfObf8PorCHT0eAeKRk9AP99jyU_PXB40cWiboL0SuBd3Mcxy4p18FeJ4HNJ9hJJ8mQ8Pj4gSBsAqJ25U3sR4mLCPjNjOlPYjhskGzNn8CVqLihn8UZClXXV5__FhiNEqkvOZ&c=s_vlJpvCTAmgNWQiFUHKyMVISf4KNkjOUnz2bUP0R8_SOjfK9gS3Jg==&ch=BJhdS3G4Pqybj5-02lrmg0I4nml8c3YGyehAM3RhdgcBP3fUHerLPQ==)

| Friend,
I wanted to thank you for your constant support and dedication to the conservative movement this past year. Your pride in this great Nation reminds me every day why I fight on Capitol Hill.
Were it not for proud patriots such as yourself, we would not have made it this far.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ifOk2sHBd2f0zMYQUryLP9KalplPfObf8PorCHT0eAeKRk9AP99jyU_PXB40cWiboL0SuBd3Mcxy4p18FeJ4HNJ9hJJ8mQ8Pj4gSBsAqJ25U3sR4mLCPjNjOlPYjhskGzNn8CVqLihn8UZClXXV5__FhiNEqkvOZ&c=s_vlJpvCTAmgNWQiFUHKyMVISf4KNkjOUnz2bUP0R8_SOjfK9gS3Jg==&ch=BJhdS3G4Pqybj5-02lrmg0I4nml8c3YGyehAM3RhdgcBP3fUHerLPQ==)
---
| 2021 was one of the most difficult years for American conservatism. However, 2022 is the year we will get America back on track. This new year will offer a better path for our great Nation.
The upcoming elections will decide the fate of America, but we will be prepared and ready for them.
Happy New Year and God bless!
Thanks for your support,
---

name: Heidi St. John
subject: *Reminder* We Are You Ready For 2022! Are You?
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---|---
|
It's almost 2022!
Happy New Year, everyone!
Are you ready to hit the ground running? At the Heidi St. John for Congress campaign, we're already gearing up for an exciting season of campaigning--and the focus is on YOU, the citizens of Southwest Washington State.
In my travels across our district, I hear the same things over and over: people are ready for new leadership. The good people of Washington state are tired of the lack of leadership we have been living under for the past decade. They're tired of electing people who don't reflect their values or push to make positive changes for their families.
As a business owner and job creator, I want to see regulations lifted so that our people can thrive, create, and grow.
As a mother and grandmother, I remain deeply concerned about the state of our schools. Critical Race Theory, which has been getting federal money, is a disgrace to our country and a divisive tool of the Marxist left. The government should never give money to schools that are promoting this racist ideology. It's time to give parents school choice and the opportunity to hold their schools accountable for the things that they are teaching our children.
The federal government is totally out of control, and I intend to work hard to shine a bright light on the many issues that are frustrating the people of our area: from federal interference in education to the never-ending mandates that are hurting our kids and our economy every day. The federal government has turned into a bureaucratic nightmare. From high taxes to rising inflation, it's time to send people to Congress who know what it takes to start and run a successful business and who have a demonstrated record of working for the communities they are running to represent.
Let's make 2022 the year we send committed Conservatives to Washington DC, and I'm here ready to represent you. I hope you will get involved in my campaign in the days and weeks to come! We have a wonderful staff in the office who can't wait to plug you in. Representative government requires that we all get involved, and I can't wait to work with you to bring positive change to our area in 2022 and beyond.
Happy New Year!
|

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | It's almost 2022! Happy New Year, everyone! Are you ready to hit the ground running? At the Heidi St. John for Congress campaign, we're already gearing up for an exciting season of campaigning--and the focus is on YOU, the citizens of Southwest Washington State. In my travels across our district, I hear the same things over and over: people are ready for new leadership. The good people of Washington state are tired of the lack of leadership we have been living under for the past decade. They're tired of electing people who don't reflect their values or push to make positive changes for their families. As a business owner and job creator, I want to see regulations lifted so that our people can thrive, create, and grow. As a mother and grandmother, I remain deeply concerned about the state of our schools. Critical Race Theory, which has been getting federal money, is a disgrace to our country and a divisive tool of the Marxist left. The government should never give money to schools that are promoting this racist ideology. It's time to give parents school choice and the opportunity to hold their schools accountable for the things that they are teaching our children. The federal government is totally out of control, and I intend to work hard to shine a bright light on the many issues that are frustrating the people of our area: from federal interference in education to the never-ending mandates that are hurting our kids and our economy every day. The federal government has turned into a bureaucratic nightmare. From high taxes to rising inflation, it's time to send people to Congress who know what it takes to start and run a successful business and who have a demonstrated record of working for the communities they are running to represent. Let's make 2022 the year we send committed Conservatives to Washington DC, and I'm here ready to represent you. I hope you will get involved in my campaign in the days and weeks to come! We have a wonderful staff in the office who can't wait to plug you in. Representative government requires that we all get involved, and I can't wait to work with you to bring positive change to our area in 2022 and beyond. Happy New Year! | | | | | In The News | == | | | | == | | | | | | == | | | == | Stay up to date at == | | | | | | == | | | | | == | == == | | | | | Friends of Heidi St. John for Congress | PO Box 2828, Battle Ground, WA 98604 | | Sent by mailto:heidi@heidistjohnforcongress.com powered by

Friend,

**My father needs you to see this.**

_**He has selected YOU for the exclusive chance to have dinner with him in Florida.**_ __At this dinner, you 'll even get the chance to discuss our critical 2022 election strategy.__

Only my father's most dedicated supporters have been selected for this opportunity, that's why we chose YOU.

All entries must be received by 11:59pm EST January 5th, 2022. One winner will receive the following Prize: transportation for one (1), made at the discretion of Elise for Congress, within the continental United States to event location and from winners home location, with an approximate retail value of $750; one (1) one-night hotel stay at one of the Palm Beach, FL hotels, with an approximate retail value of $400; one (1) ticket to the Elise For Congress roundtable with President Trump Dinner, with an approximate retail value of $150; and ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $100. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $1,400. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of maturity as determined by state law. Restrictions and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply, they are listed in the [Official Rules.](https://click.email.donaldjtrump.com/?qs=2dc55e8184c155df556deeb9e2794b40a628479cc8229d506d78d36fd46b4e92c621b5b93af27cd55eb6d9bc08a9af7bcd715bee5419c2f3) The Sponsor is Elise for Congress, PO Box 500, Glens Falls, NY 12801.
This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
Save America JFC, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA, 22219 US

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of Save America and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. President Trump is calling on you to take the next step and become an Official Trump Day One Club Member. You can activate your membership by **[following this link.](https://click.email.donaldjtrump.com/?qs=2dc55e8184c155dfd8076ed15e7ff8b68909b6b7c6199ee1295da5db7f682438abe8a94ec9bd0596fa1371a7b952940671496bb2c33b0a64)**

[](https://click.email.donaldjtrump.com/?qs=2dc55e8184c155dfd8076ed15e7ff8b68909b6b7c6199ee1295da5db7f682438abe8a94ec9bd0596fa1371a7b952940671496bb2c33b0a64)

Thank you for joining Team Trump. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we've been able to consistently call out the Fake News media every single time they try to spread misinformation or outright lies about the important work President Trump is doing to Save America. Reaching grassroots supporters directly is critical if we're going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.

**TEXT TRUMP to 88022** to start receiving text messages from President Trump.

[](https://click.email.donaldjtrump.com/?qs=2dc55e8184c155dfb76c446bc72cfbdb9e6bb94b4b893bbb22eab74119bfbc7134b9046b76647519488931293ac212c6a105f32bbb88a986)

You can also sign up to receive **[text messages](https://click.email.donaldjtrump.com/?qs=2dc55e8184c155df1d91e9794bb9851fe6594c4197d9671596e3d1a4bb748ec748d199c7b2e1d242acb6d074a340882ddd89712a81e862c7)** from Team Trump, members of the Trump family, and even the President himself. If you would like to opt out of important campaign updates like this, please _[click here.](https://click.email.donaldjtrump.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=0850345b25410abc7b17a44d6218dc4f5826b1f953429dd21629e4de6c9253ca83cb6e84c00384fec173105796e9a7e7e5d8031257086cc27e17a491c61c47ef)_ If you would like to give feedback to the President, **[click here.](https://click.email.donaldjtrump.com/?qs=2dc55e8184c155dfb76c446bc72cfbdb9e6bb94b4b893bbb22eab74119bfbc7134b9046b76647519488931293ac212c6a105f32bbb88a986)** It's because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like you Friend, that we will Save America! Thank you again for your generous support. name: Kelly Hall, Executive Director
subject: wow !!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
Thanks to the generosity of supporters like you, we were able to hit our $8,500 End-of-Year fundraising goal! | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40279413/323608103/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNThhODRiNS0xYzZiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9sZsXLmyAesrc46fqKnEIJAH2qneAF4jsTYj2WUx1gQ=&emci=07ae9473-da68-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&emdi=a58a84b5-1c6b-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&ceid=561582) | Friend, WOW! Thanks to the generosity of supporters like you, we were able to hit our $8,500 End-of-Year fundraising goal! Hitting this goal does so much more than helping us fuel up for the 2022 ballot measure fights we have ahead of us this year — it sends the message that **working people across the country are ready for change.** While Congress spends the next year stuck in gridlock, we’ll be fighting alongside voters across the country demanding progress and enacting life-changing policies like higher wages, expanded health care, and paid leave. Reaching this goal puts us in a great position to plan — _and win_ — more campaigns in 2022, 2023, and beyond. These funds will go straight to work, paying for research and polling, organizing in local communities, and more. **So, friend, from all of us at the Fairness Project, I want to say thank you for helping us hit our highest goal ever and starting 2022 off on a strong note.** While we’re counting this as a major victory, there is still much to do in our fight for racial, social, and economic justice. We’ll be in touch over the coming weeks with campaign updates and ways that you can help. Thank you again, and we wish you and your loved ones a very Happy New Year! Kelly Hall
_Executive Director_
_Fairness Project_
---

clean_body: Thanks to the generosity of supporters like you, we were able to hit our $8,500 End-of-Year fundraising goal! | | Friend, WOW! Thanks to the generosity of supporters like you, we were able to hit our $8,500 End-of-Year fundraising goal! Hitting this goal does so much more than helping us fuel up for the 2022 ballot measure fights we have ahead of us this year — it sends the message that working people across the country are ready for change. While Congress spends the next year stuck in gridlock, we’ll be fighting alongside voters across the country demanding progress and enacting life-changing policies like higher wages, expanded health care, and paid leave. Reaching this goal puts us in a great position to plan — and win — more campaigns in 2022, 2023, and beyond. These funds will go straight to work, paying for research and polling, organizing in local communities, and more. So, friend, from all of us at the Fairness Project, I want to say thank you for helping us hit our highest goal ever and starting 2022 off on a strong note. While we’re counting this as a major victory, there is still much to do in our fight for racial, social, and economic justice. We’ll be in touch over the coming weeks with campaign updates and ways that you can help. Thank you again, and we wish you and your loved ones a very Happy New Year! Kelly Hall Executive Director Fairness Project = Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 23 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. name: Jim Jordan
subject: Bumping this up in your inbox
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59148460:JpTrrbE8N:m:1:3253819041:A0BD45170E466956BE7466D671D395C3:r)
---
Peter

First off, I want to wish you a belated Merry Christmas and take this opportunity to wish you a joyous new year. This has been quite the year and fortunately for us, it's coming to a swift close. Next up: 2022 - the year of the Republican takeover of Washington.

While we certainly have the momentum behind us, we can't risk blowing it by not preparing ahead or taking the Democrat threat seriously.

That's why, one last time, **[I'm writing to see if you can possibly spare a couple of dollars to help me and my team hit our end of year fundraising goal.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59148460:JpTrrbE8N:m:1:3253819041:A0BD45170E466956BE7466D671D395C3:r)** We missed it, and I'm extending it for ONE DAY ONLY.

I said it then and I'll say it again now: we're still looking for additional donors at this time to help ensure every Republican campaign - including my own - has the opportunity to run the most effective race possible next year.

**[That's why we're humbly asking that you make a contribution of $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 before midnight tonight.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59148460:JpTrrbE8N:m:1:3253819041:A0BD45170E466956BE7466D671D395C3:r)
**
**We 're in need of an additional $4,000 by tonight at midnight and counting on your generosity to help us across the year-end finish line**.

If you've been planning to make a donation this year and haven't yet done so, please take a moment to read the email I sent out before Christmas (**and copied below**) so you know why your buy-in is so important.

Thank you,
Jim

\-----------------------------------------------
From: Jim Jordan
To: "dpwillis67@gmail.com"
Date: Tuesday, December 28, 2021 at 8:12 AM
Subject: If we don't act swiftly ...

Peter,

I just got a text message from my finance team and they're telling me that we're going to fall short of our year-end fundraising goals if we don't act swiftly.

We know that you've got important everyday life to keep you occupied and you're likely not focused on the election next year; that's why we've toned back the frequency of our emails to you this month. Afterall, this is the most joyous time of year!

But next December won't be the most joyous time of year if we fail to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi in next November's midterms. **Right now, Pelosi and her Democrat incumbents are sitting on more than $67.5 million that they 're planning to use to drag every Republican from Alaska to Ohio to Maine through the mud.**

[**HELP TEAM JORDAN REACH OUR YEAR END GOAL ➞ **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59148460:JpTrrbE8N:m:1:3253819041:A0BD45170E466956BE7466D671D395C3:r)
Believe it or not, we're still looking for additional donors at this time to help ensure every Republican campaign - including my own - has the opportunity to run the most effective race possible next year.

**[That's why we're humbly asking that you make a contribution of $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 before midnight tonight.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59148460:JpTrrbE8N:m:1:3253819041:A0BD45170E466956BE7466D671D395C3:r)**

Every liberal political activist, consultant and media personality in the country is going to be watching out for the Q4 year-end fundraising report once we release it in early January. My campaigns' total contributions are often used as a barometer for what other Republicans are likely to be able to raise in an election year. **[That's why it's so important to hit our goal.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59148460:JpTrrbE8N:m:1:3253819041:A0BD45170E466956BE7466D671D395C3:r)**

[**HELP TEAM JORDAN REACH OUR YEAR END GOAL ➞ **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59148460:JpTrrbE8N:m:1:3253819041:A0BD45170E466956BE7466D671D395C3:r)
We're in a strong position to retake the House majority next November because of the generosity of conservative donors from all 50 states. You may not have a competitive election where you live, but that shouldn't stop you from helping out conservative candidates who could make the difference between two more years of Nancy Pelosi or a Republican majority.

**Pelosi is targeting conservatives in races in all 50 states and she has more money than she knows what to do with.**

**Pelosi is RUTHLESS and she will do everything in her power to make sure we FAIL.**

**Please don 't pass up this opportunity to make a contribution in 2021. We need your help to ensure that PELOSI fails in her quest to retain the speaker's gavel.**

FOR LIBERTY AND FREEDOM,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59148460:JpTrrbE8N:m:1:3253819041:A0BD45170E466956BE7466D671D395C3:r)

clean_body: | Peter First off, I want to wish you a belated Merry Christmas and take this opportunity to wish you a joyous new year. This has been quite the year and fortunately for us, it's coming to a swift close. Next up: 2022 - the year of the Republican takeover of Washington. While we certainly have the momentum behind us, we can't risk blowing it by not preparing ahead or taking the Democrat threat seriously. That's why, one last time, We missed it, and I'm extending it for ONE DAY ONLY. I said it then and I'll say it again now: we're still looking for additional donors at this time to help ensure every Republican campaign - including my own - has the opportunity to run the most effective race possible next year. We 're in need of an additional $4,000 by tonight at midnight and counting on your generosity to help us across the year-end finish line. If you've been planning to make a donation this year and haven't yet done so, please take a moment to read the email I sent out before Christmas (and copied below) so you know why your buy-in is so important. Thank you, Jim \----------------------------------------------- From: Jim Jordan To: "dpwillis67@gmail.com" Date: Tuesday, December 28, 2021 at 8:12 AM Subject: If we don't act swiftly ... Peter, I just got a text message from my finance team and they're telling me that we're going to fall short of our year-end fundraising goals if we don't act swiftly. We know that you've got important everyday life to keep you occupied and you're likely not focused on the election next year; that's why we've toned back the frequency of our emails to you this month. Afterall, this is the most joyous time of year! But next December won't be the most joyous time of year if we fail to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi in next November's midterms. Right now, Pelosi and her Democrat incumbents are sitting on more than $67.5 million that they 're planning to use to drag every Republican from Alaska to Ohio to Maine through the mud. Believe it or not, we're still looking for additional donors at this time to help ensure every Republican campaign - including my own - has the opportunity to run the most effective race possible next year. Every liberal political activist, consultant and media personality in the country is going to be watching out for the Q4 year-end fundraising report once we release it in early January. My campaigns' total contributions are often used as a barometer for what other Republicans are likely to be able to raise in an election year. We're in a strong position to retake the House majority next November because of the generosity of conservative donors from all 50 states. You may not have a competitive election where you live, but that shouldn't stop you from helping out conservative candidates who could make the difference between two more years of Nancy Pelosi or a Republican majority. Pelosi is targeting conservatives in races in all 50 states and she has more money than she knows what to do with. Pelosi is RUTHLESS and she will do everything in her power to make sure we FAIL. Please don 't pass up this opportunity to make a contribution in 2021. We need your help to ensure that PELOSI fails in her quest to retain the speaker's gavel. name: Charlie Gearing
subject: We did it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas
body:
Peter -

I hope you and your family are having a wonderful New Years Day! I just wanted to take a moment to express my gratitude and appreciation for your support.
Yesterday was the biggest fundraising deadline we have faced and I appreciate you bearing with all the emails, calls, and texts while we pushed towards our goal. The outpouring of support we have seen from across the 114th District has been incredible and I just want you to know how thankful Rachael and I are for your support.

I’m also proud to say that, because of folks like you, we hit our fundraising goal to close out the year!

Your continued support throughout this campaign has meant the world to our team. We’re building a strong coalition of grassroots supporters who believe in a better future for our families, children, schools, neighborhoods, and communities here in Texas.

So, thank you again for being with us on this journey, I’m excited for the year ahead.

- Charlie

Charlie Gearing is a born and raised North Texan running for Texas House District 114 in East Dallas. He believes we need to fight for the things that matter to Texas families – investing in our teachers and students, creating good-paying jobs, expanding Medicaid, holding ERCOT accountable, restoring voting rights, and rolling back dangerous abortion restrictions.

subject: Some exciting news to share

body:
I couldn’t be prouder to have you on the team now as we begin 2022.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40281336/323616687/1512333912?refcode=BLU-KING-20220101-1-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=3b14b842-246b-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjE0Yjg0Mi0yNDZiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gw4pSYhZ5MVZmB6C4exyh91PfIgSkP5zwsqGnOnyfMg=)

| Peter,

First, I’d like to express how grateful I am for all the support you’ve shown our campaign in the past few days – your commitment to helping me build a more equitable Maryland reaffirms to my team and me that we have real momentum pushing us into this election year. Whether you’ve been with me from the very first day we launched this campaign for governor, or whether you’ve just recently joined this movement, **I couldn’t be prouder to have you on the team now as we begin 2022.**

Because of your support, we reached our 2021 fundraising goal and are in a stronger position than we’ve ever been. I can’t wait to see what this new year brings and I’m so grateful you’re on this journey with me.

Building a movement for real change takes real commitment, and I’m excited by each new face that joins our cause. **On that topic, my team and I have some exciting news on the horizon.**

**We’re on the brink of choosing a running mate to fight alongside us and, as a dedicated member of Team King, I want you to be the first to hear about who she is.** **If you Text TEAM to 48178 right now, you’ll be the first to know who I’m asking to join this ticket!** I couldn’t be more excited to share this news with you – it marks such an important phase in this campaign.

Thank you again for your support,

John King

name: Conservative Direct
subject: AOC Blasted for Suggesting Republicans 'Mad' They Cannot Date Her
body:
Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-NY) on Friday suggested Republicans are upset they cannot date her and should admit it. -- Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-NY) on Friday suggested Republicans are upset they cannot date her and should admit it. “If Republicans are mad they can’t date me they can just say that instead of projecting their sexual frustrations onto my boyfriend’s feet. Ya creepy weirdos,” she wrote in a social media post: Her comments were in response to criticism from social media user Steve Cortes that Ocasio-Cortez was reportedly in Florida. “If Leftists like AOC actually thought mandates and masking worked, they wouldn’t be frolicking in free FL,” he wrote, adding, “Her guy is showing his gross pale male feet in public (not at a pool/beach) with hideous sandals”: The openly socialist Ocasio-Cortez was reportedly celebrating New Year’s in Miami, Florida, as her own state of New York endured the omicron surge. In a subsequent post on Friday, the young woman said, “It’s starting to get old ignoring the very obvious, strange, and deranged sexual frustrations that underpin the Republican fixation on me, women,& LGBT+ people in general.” “These people clearly need therapy, won’t do it, and use politics as their outlet instead. It’s really weird,” she continued: Several social media users replied with criticism, one person writing, “Lol. Practice what you preach and you wouldn’t have to get defensive.” “Interesting how you don’t stay in your own lockdown state and instead head to a state where freedom is allowed. I sincerely hope you’re thanking the Florida governor for your lovely trip,” another commented. Meanwhile, founder of the BLEXIT movement, Candance Owens, weighed in on Ocasio-Cortez’s initial comments, writing, “‘You just want to have sex me’ is potentially the filthiest, most immature response I’ve ever heard uttered from an elected official that is facing critique.” “She’s quite literally creating a Republican sexual fantasy about herself. #AocMeltdown,” Owens concluded. Washington, DC, and New York lead the country in reporting the most cases of the coronavirus per capita, despite some of the most stringent vaccine mandates in the nation, Breitbart News reported Friday. “Both D.C. and New York lead the nation in reporting the highest number of daily coronavirus cases per capita, and both are well above the U.S. average, which sits at 104 per 100,000 as of Friday,” the article read. |

clean_body: Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-NY) on Friday suggested Republicans are upset they cannot date her and should admit it. -- Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-NY) on Friday suggested Republicans are upset they cannot date her and should admit it. “If Republicans are mad they can’t date me they can just say that instead of projecting their sexual frustrations onto my boyfriend’s feet. Ya creepy weirdos,” she wrote in a social media post: Her comments were in response to criticism from social media user Steve Cortes that Ocasio-Cortez was reportedly in Florida. “If Leftists like AOC actually thought mandates and masking worked, they wouldn’t be frolicking in free FL,” he wrote, adding, “Her guy is showing his gross pale male feet in public (not at a pool/beach) with hideous sandals”: The openly socialist Ocasio-Cortez was reportedly celebrating New Year’s in Miami, Florida, as her own state of New York endured the omicron surge. In a subsequent post on Friday, the young woman said, “It’s starting to get old ignoring the very obvious, strange, and deranged sexual frustrations that underpin the Republican fixation on me, women,& LGBT+ people in general.” “These people clearly need therapy, won’t do it, and use politics as their outlet instead. It’s really weird,” she continued: Several social media users replied with criticism, one person writing, “Lol. Practice what you preach and you wouldn’t have to get defensive.” “Interesting how you don’t stay in your own lockdown state and instead head to a state where freedom is allowed. I sincerely hope you’re thanking the Florida governor for your lovely trip,” another commented. Meanwhile, founder of the BLEXIT movement, Candance Owens, weighed in on Ocasio-Cortez’s initial comments, writing, “‘You just want to have sex me’ is potentially the filthiest, most immature response I’ve ever heard uttered from an elected official that is facing critique.” “She’s quite literally creating a Republican sexual fantasy about herself. #AocMeltdown,” Owens concluded. Washington, DC, and New York lead the country in reporting the most cases of the coronavirus per capita, despite some of the most stringent vaccine mandates in the nation, Breitbart News reported Friday. “Both D.C. and New York lead the nation in reporting the highest number of daily coronavirus cases per capita, and both are well above the U.S. average, which sits at 104 per 100,000 as of Friday,” the article read. | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | ---|---|--- | | Dig Deeper... name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: I’m especially grateful for you!
body:
Happy New Year! **As we begin this new year, I am so thankful for you.** There is no one I would rather have by my side to face the challenges and enjoy the successes that will surely fill up the year ahead. Tea Party Patriots Action isn’t waiting to get started on all of the exciting plans we have to make advances for liberty and for America. Over the first two months of the year, we will hold Election Integrity tours in Wisconsin, Michigan, Pennsylvania, Nevada, Arizona, and North Carolina. At the end of last year, we had over 700 fired-up Georgians attend the tour in Georgia, to build out permanent election integrity infrastructure, at both the state and local levels. This is the reality – Election Integrity _will_ happen in our country and it _will_ happen in 2022 – **_thanks to you._** Also, I am so grateful for all of support for Tea Party Patriots Foundation’s year-end campaign to fund additional election integrity training in 2022. It’s all hands on deck, and you delivered! That’s all I wanted to say today – I don’t want to take up a bunch of your time. Enjoy the fresh start that a new year brings, and enjoy the poem I’ve included below my signature! It really captures a lot about the times we are living in. Have a wonderful day, and let’s save America together in 2022! Happy New Year! Jenny Beth Martin | |
---
**_In Memoriam, [Ring out, wild bells]_**
**\- Alfred Lord Tennyson**

Ring out, wild bells, to the wild sky,
The flying cloud, the frosty light:
The year is dying in the night;
Ring out, wild bells, and let him die.

Ring out the old, ring in the new,
Ring, happy bells, across the snow:
The year is going, let him go;
Ring out the false, ring in the true.

Ring out the grief that saps the mind
For those that here we see no more;
Ring out the feud of rich and poor,
Ring in redress to all mankind.

Ring out a slowly dying cause,
And ancient forms of party strife;
Ring in the nobler modes of life,
With sweeter manners, purer laws.

Ring out the want, the care, the sin,
The faithless coldness of the times;
Ring out, ring out my mournful rhymes
But ring the fuller minstrel in.

Ring out false pride in place and blood,
The civic slander and the spite;
Ring in the love of truth and right,
Ring in the common love of good.

Ring out old shapes of foul disease;
Ring out the narrowing lust of gold;
Ring out the thousand wars of old,
Ring in the thousand years of peace.

Ring in the valiant man and free,
The larger heart, the kindlier hand;
Ring out the darkness of the land,
Ring in the Christ that is to be.
|

clean_body: Happy New Year! As we begin this new year, I am so thankful for you. There is no one I would rather have by my side to face the challenges and enjoy the successes that will surely fill up the year ahead. Tea Party Patriots Action isn’t waiting to get started on all of the exciting plans we have to make advances for liberty and for America. Over the first two months of the year, we will hold Election Integrity tours in Wisconsin, Michigan, Pennsylvania, Nevada, Arizona, and North Carolina. At the end of last year, we had over 700 fired-up Georgians attend the tour in Georgia, to build out permanent election integrity infrastructure, at both the state and local levels. This is the reality – Election Integrity will happen in our country and it will happen in 2022 – thanks to you. Also, I am so grateful for all of support for Tea Party Patriots Foundation’s year-end campaign to fund additional election integrity training in 2022. It’s all hands on deck, and you delivered! That’s all I wanted to say today – I don’t want to take up a bunch of your time. Enjoy the fresh start that a new year brings, and enjoy the poem I’ve included below my signature! It really captures a lot about the times we are living in. Have a wonderful day, and let’s save America together in 2022! Happy New Year! Jenny Beth Martin | | In Memoriam, [Ring out, wild bells] \- Alfred Lord Tennyson Ring out, wild bells, to the wild sky, The flying cloud, the frosty light: The year is dying in the night; Ring out, wild bells, and let him die. Ring out the old, ring in the new, Ring, happy bells, across the snow: The year is going, let him go; Ring out the false, ring in the true. Ring out the grief that saps the mind For those that here we see no more; Ring out the feud of rich and poor, Ring in redress to all mankind. Ring out a slowly dying cause, And ancient forms of party strife; Ring in the nobler modes of life, With sweeter manners, purer laws. Ring out the want, the care, the sin, The faithless coldness of the times; Ring out, ring out my mournful rhymes But ring the fuller minstrel in. Ring out false pride in place and blood, The civic slander and the spite; Ring in the love of truth and right, Ring in the common love of good. Ring out old shapes of foul disease; Ring out the narrowing lust of gold; Ring out the thousand wars of old, Ring in the thousand years of peace. Ring in the valiant man and free, The larger heart, the kindlier hand; Ring out the darkness of the land, Ring in the Christ that is to be. | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Freedom Agenda for 2022 – update from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/progressupdate-8132202?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

Happy New Year!

Mississippi’s new legislative session starts in a few days, and I wanted to share with you the **Freedom Agenda 2022 - a list of the 12 reforms that we are pushing for.

Mississippi needs a boost**. While many southern states have flourished over the past forty years, Mississippi has been held back by bad public policy. **Instead of relying on federal handouts, in 2022 our state leaders need to do more to create the conditions that allow actual wealth creation. **

Here are 12 realistic, achievable reforms that we can implement in 2022 to extend economic liberty, cut taxes and help our state grow:
**Freedom Agenda 2022**
1. **Open School Enrolment: **If Mississippi is to prosper, we need to address the elephant in the room — education underachievement. To improve public schools in Mississippi, we need to give moms and dads more control. We believe families dissatisfied with what their local school board offers them should have the right to send their child — and their tax dollars — to a different school of their choice.
2. **Cap School Board Administrative Costs: **Per pupil spending has risen in Mississippi, but teacher pay has not. That’s because too much of the education budget gets spent on fat cat bureaucrats’ salaries. We need to cap administration costs and ensure money goes into the classroom instead.
3. **More Charter Schools: **We need multiple Charter School authorizers so that we have more than a handful of Charter Schools. Unless we change the mandate of the Authorizer Board to allow more Charter Schools, we should have multiple authorizers.
4. **Combat Critical Race Theory: **Rather than equipping young people with the skills they need to flourish, too often our education system seems more focused on introducing toxic theories and ideologies into the classroom. We have already published a bill to combat Critical Race Theory, which we have sent to every member of the legislature.
5. **Academic Transparency: **Parents deserve to know what their children are being taught. One idea to combat Critical Race Theory is to require school boards to publish details of what they are actually teaching young Mississippians.
6. **Free Speech on Campus: **The best way to defeat bad ideas is to ensure that they are replaced by better ones. This is why we need to safeguard free speech on our college campuses.
7. **Axe the Tax: **Other Southern states like Tennessee, Texas, and Florida do not have a state income tax — and are flourishing. We need to abolish the state income tax here, too. With a billion-dollar budget surplus, our state can afford it!
8. **Cut the Red Tape: **We are behind a one-in-two-out proposal that would force officials to reduce regulatory red tape.
9. **Certificate of Need Repeal: **Mississippi has some of the worst health outcomes in America because we have some of the most severe restrictions on expanding healthcare facilities. We believe that the free market should decide if there is a need for particular services, and our idea is to remove these “good-old-boy” restrictions.
10. **Repeal of Moratorium on Home Health Agencies: **With more folks than ever seeking to get medical care from the comfort of their own homes, we support making it easier to offer medical access directly.
11. **Reduce Barriers to Telemedicine: **In an age of unprecedented integration between digital technology and daily life, we believe that Mississippians should be allowed to access their healthcare systems and doctors using modern devices.
12. **Agricultural “Sandbox:" **We would like to empower innovators and small businesses to bring new technology to market with reduced regulatory burdens that could allow for Mississippi to become the nation’s leader in this field.

**How will we measure progress?**
How will you know what progress we make in achieving these changes? Our team will provide weekly updates. **We have also built a Legislative Tracker – This enables you to see how our reform agenda is progressing!**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=4eff71c141&e=5703353baa)
---
**_Click on the image above to view the tracker site!_**
| | | As well as tracking the progress of bills, we will track and monitor the voting record of each individual lawmaker. **By lifting the lid on the legislature, we will allow you – and hundreds of thousands of Mississippians – to see whose side your elected officials are on in the fight to advance freedom!**
---
|
Thank you for reading this – and for the interest you have in the success of our state.

Having been in this role for exactly one year, I cannot tell you what an honor it is for me – an Englishman – to be living and working in the greatest state in the greatest country on earth!

Let’s make Mississippi even more prosperous and free in 2022...

---
| |
---

Warm Regards this New Year,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| |
---
| _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=cadcc0645c) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=cadcc0645c).

| | Hello!

2021 has been a CRAZY year! With so much to reflect upon this past year, both good and bad, we wanted to celebrate the New Year with you. Cheers to all of the amazing things you've accomplished, the trials you overcame, and the memories you made this past year. Looking ahead to 2022, let's walk in with our heads held high and ready to make even more incredible things happen.

Thank you so much for the wonderful year. We wouldn't be able to do it without your support. We hope you're willing to take on 2022 with us, and we wish you nothing but the absolute best this coming year.

Thank you,
Team Katzenmeyer

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
_Sponsored message_
| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmokdpf57ifpn0503ng9ucbjpsm6vc6s4ocguea0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c1hmcor4cdh2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj5ktqhjhai720cj444187cp9raiiif3biiahpn8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c1hmcor4cdh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5mj9tv8jufv6alc7b4vo2emf6ct5ads86ftqtf8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c1hmcor4cdh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Congresswoman Val Demings
subject: Happy New Year!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
When I woke up this morning, I felt hopeful.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40284146/323631270/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1833-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDZiZDNiNC0zNTZiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jpFSOrjQF_rrXR168aWvceEB6SsxKeO5iejSUe2nPyk=)
---
Friend,

When I woke up this morning, I felt _hopeful._
Over the past seven months, supporters like you have helped me build a grassroots movement that's strong enough to move mountains. And over the past week, when it seemed like I might not be able to hit my $250,000 End of Quarter goal, you stepped up to make it happen, ensuring I could kick off this election year on the strongest foot possible. I can't thank you enough for believing in my campaign, and I'm so grateful to have you by my side.
It's the first day of 2022, and we now have an incredible opportunity before us: This year, we can deliver better leadership to Floridians and the country by defeating Marco Rubio. If we win, Friend, Democrats are _virtually guaranteed _to keep and even expand our Senate majority.
That's why I'm feeling so optimistic today, because my race can deliver Democrats the power to build a brighter future for America – one where reproductive freedom is protected, every eligible voter can participate in our democracy, everyone has access to affordable health care and we finally take action to save lives from gun violence.
This election is the opportunity of a lifetime, and there's no doubt in my mind that we CAN win. But with that progress we all yearn for hinging on Florida, Republicans will undoubtedly pour millions into this race to defeat me. Losing momentum for even one second – missing this goal – could put me behind. And falling short before Election Day could mean losing the Senate or keeping a 50-50 status quo where one bad vote could stall our progress, so I need your help today.
**I need to raise $25,000 before midnight to start off 2022 on the right foot, so I have to ask:[Will you donate $5 right now to help me reach my goal, flip Florida blue and fight for a brighter future in the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40284147/323631271/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1833-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDZiZDNiNC0zNTZiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jpFSOrjQF_rrXR168aWvceEB6SsxKeO5iejSUe2nPyk=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40284148/323631272/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1833-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDZiZDNiNC0zNTZiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jpFSOrjQF_rrXR168aWvceEB6SsxKeO5iejSUe2nPyk=)
---
Thank you again for your support in 2021. I wish you and yours a very happy new year.

Val Demings
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40284149/323631273/1581265324?refcode=jtk1833-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDZiZDNiNC0zNTZiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jpFSOrjQF_rrXR168aWvceEB6SsxKeO5iejSUe2nPyk=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? **[Click here to donate now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40284150/323631274/1581265324?refcode=jtk1833-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDZiZDNiNC0zNTZiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jpFSOrjQF_rrXR168aWvceEB6SsxKeO5iejSUe2nPyk=)** If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, **[please click here to visit my campaign store.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40284151/323631275/-460395862?refcode=jtk1833-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDZiZDNiNC0zNTZiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jpFSOrjQF_rrXR168aWvceEB6SsxKeO5iejSUe2nPyk=&emci=35be03c7-d868-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&emdi=506bd3b4-356b-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&ceid=20244100)** Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic.
---

Email is an important way for us to keep this team informed about campaign updates. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40284152/323631276/-144803992?refcode=jtk1833-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDZiZDNiNC0zNTZiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jpFSOrjQF_rrXR168aWvceEB6SsxKeO5iejSUe2nPyk=&emci=35be03c7-d868-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&emdi=506bd3b4-356b-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&ceid=20244100), or click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/35be03c7-d868-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e/506bd3b4-356b-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDZiZDNiNC0zNTZiLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jpFSOrjQF_rrXR168aWvceEB6SsxKeO5iejSUe2nPyk=&id=123159867).

name: Nate Sandvig & Team
subject: Best Wishes for a Happy New Year!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sandvig for Congress
body:
We’re hitting the ground running as we kick off 2022.
| | | Friends,

Happy New Year!

There’s no doubt that the last couple of years have been extremely challenging – from the pandemic and government’s overreaction and overreach to Portland’s downward spiral to this disastrous new era of complete Democrat control in Washington.

Yet HOPE remains alive and FREEDOM will prevail...

**Standing strong and united, we’re going take back our country in 2022 to secure the future we’ll leave our children and grandchildren!**
---
---
Here at Team Sandvig, we’re not wasting a moment. We’re hitting the ground running to win this race, take back the House, and SAVE AMERICA from the radical left.

Thank you, as always, for being part of our amazing grassroots team.

Again, Happy New Year an ALL the best to you and your loved ones!

\- Nate Sandvig & Team

name: Casey Wardynski & Team Wardynski
subject: Happy New Year!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CASEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Let’s look forward to a promising 2022 together! Read more >>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/9db90001c81c6379/2e9b3d0004dc668dc3d6b838967d376c/36963)
---
Peter, Happy New Year! We’ve finally closed the door on a rough 2021, and 2022 is shaping up to be a promising year. Peter, we can’t thank you enough for being part of Team Wardynski. And we’re looking forward to fighting by your side to take back Congress and our great country next November.
---
---
Let’s continue to help one another and work together towards a brighter future, with the firm knowledge that our hope rests in a higher power. The best is yet to come for Alabama and America. And it starts right now. To 2022 and beyond,
Casey Wardynski & Team Wardynski
---

name: Bridget Barton
subject: This is OUR Year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bridget Barton for Oregon
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/d87bb1bf48eb013366a6b3c4b83ff292/37693/c26419214f8063d4/8194e1904b22a014c3d6b838967d376c/37693)
---
Happy New Year, from the Barton family to yours!

I hope that your weekend, and your new year, is off to a great start. I’ve been reflecting this morning on the tough year we just wrapped up. Oregonians have had enough. There’s a RED WAVE growing across America, and I know that standing together, strong and united for freedom, we’re going to break the left’s grip on power. Total far-left control of Washington, D.C. and our beautiful Oregon has been a complete and total disaster. It's time to solve the problems they've allowed to fester -- to get a grip on crime and homelessness, and improve our failing schools.

This November when we WIN our state’s top office, I’m ready to unleash Oregon.

We have big plans to kick off the new year strong, so be sure to look out for our messages.

Thank you, again, for ALL your support in this fight ... and all the best in 2022!

\- Bridget
---

name: Mark Kelly and Gabby Giffords
subject: Happy New Year (with a cute baby picture)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
From our family to yours, we want to wish you a safe, healthy, and happy New Year.
#

Friends —
From our family to yours, we want to wish you a safe, healthy, and happy New Year.
_(Us in Tucson with our first grandchild, Sage!)_
We could not be more thankful for your continued support over the years.
All our best,
Mark and Gabby
* * *

**Mark is hoping to start the year out with people signing up to say they endorse his re-election campaign. Can you please add your name today?**
**[ENDORSE MARK](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-jan?source=em220101-1-7&t=1&akid=1891%2E6688874%2EBb5Db1)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=1891%2E6688874%2EBb5Db1).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Hi team -- I want you to know that I reviewed this community's past survey responses and was extremely impressed.

**That's why, after careful consideration and multiple conversations with our Senior Leadership Team, I'm inviting you to join the DSCC's exclusive Majority Strategy Group.**

The handful of folks in this group provide critical input to our Senior Leadership Team and are helping us finalize the Democratic Party's official strategy to defend and expand our Senate majority.

We were _only_ able to flip the Senate because of the strategic decisions you helped us make leading up to the 2020 elections. And I'm 100% confident your input will help us win again.

**[So please, click this link to accept my personal invitation right away.](https://go.dscc.org/go/5995?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20220101-Christie-StrategyGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220101-Christie-StrategyGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=2367%2E9716520%2ES9FlKW)**

_*To maintain the integrity of our data, we ask that you please do not share your link with non-members._

I'm excited to have you on the team!

Christie
DSCC Executive Director

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

body:
I want to start this year by saying thank you for your ongoing support of my work in Congress.

| Happy New Year, team!

I want to start this year by saying thank you for your ongoing support of my work in Congress and my campaign to continue serving the families and workers in San Diego and across the nation.

Thanks to you, we are beginning this crucial election year in a strong position to take on whatever challenges come our way. I am committed to working every day to improve the lives of all Americans and build a better future for generations to come.

I know the last two years have been really difficult, and there is still so much uncertainty. But I know that working together, we can make 2022 a year of health and happiness.

Thank you,
Sara

[_**P.S. body:
add your name for Mitch McConnell and his MAGA minions
| **🚨 BREAKING NEWS ALERT FROM THE NEW YORK TIMES 🚨**
**Voting Battles of 2022 Take Shape as G.O.P. Crafts New Election Bills**

Team, this is just the latest right wing attack on our sacred right to vote -- _and we’re SICK of it!_ [That’s why we’ve drafted a BRAND NEW open letter to Senate Republicans and need 15,000 Democrats to sign on RIGHT NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4692?t=6&akid=1072%2E878179%2ENqh4Dj) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4692?t=7&akid=1072%2E878179%2ENqh4Dj) | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER AND FIRE SENATE REPUBLICANS »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4693?t=8&akid=1072%2E878179%2ENqh4Dj)
---
**TO:** SENATE REPUBLICANS
**FROM:** A Concerned American
**DATE:** January 1, 2022

**Dear Mitch McConnell and your MAGA minions,**

_How many times do we have to do this?_

The American people gave the Democrats a MANDATE to protect voting rights when we sweeped the 2020 Election.

The For the People Act.
The John Lewis Voting Rights Act.
The Right to Vote Act.

**These bills are incredibly popular with the American people and would ensure every person has the ability to vote in free and fair elections.

**Yet YOU continue to block these bills every chance you get! _Are you afraid of running a fair campaign?_
**
[I’m BEYOND sick of it, and I’m sick of you, which is why I’m donating $2 right now to VPP so they can FUND your FIRING »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4692?t=9&akid=1072%2E878179%2ENqh4Dj)** | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4693?t=10&akid=1072%2E878179%2ENqh4Dj)
---
**I know why you refuse to support this legislation -- you and your alt-right friends know that if you can’t CHEAT, you can’t WIN!**

I’m so tired of you playing games with our constitutional rights, and it’s clear you’ll never come around to do the right thing.

That’s why I’m going to do everything in my power to kick you all out of power and shrink your majority even further! [And it starts right now with my $2 donation to VPP to BOOT you from office »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4693?t=11&akid=1072%2E878179%2ENqh4Dj)
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4693?t=12&akid=1072%2E878179%2ENqh4Dj)
---
Regards,

**_xx A Concerned American_**
_!! SIGNATURE PENDING $2 DONATION!!_
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4693?t=13&akid=1072%2E878179%2ENqh4Dj)
---
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1072%2E878179%2ENqh4Dj). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1072%2E878179%2ENqh4Dj).**

I’m so tired of you playing games with our constitutional rights, and it’s clear you’ll never come around to do the right thing. That’s why I’m going to do everything in my power to kick you all out of power and shrink your majority even further! Regards, xx A Concerned American !! SIGNATURE PENDING $2 DONATION!! | | Paid for by VPP (www.protectvoting.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104 The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps. Please, consider making a . Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a. to request fewer emails. | | Hi everyone, Happy New Year! Today, I’m thinking about the possibilities that lie ahead of us with this new year. These past few years, I’ve dedicated my work as governor to expanding opportunities for all Nevadans. From **strengthening our public education, to defending reproductive rights, expanding voting access, and signing a public health insurance option into law** — I’ve been committed to fighting for progress since Day One. _And this year will be no different._ 2022 marks a new chapter for this team as we prepare to defend our legislative wins from my 6 Republican opponents and continue to push for progress in the Silver State. With all that lies ahead, I’m hoping I can count on each and every one of you to support our efforts. clean_body: | | | | | Hi everyone, Happy New Year! Today, I’m thinking about the possibilities that lie ahead of us with this new year. These past few years, I’ve dedicated my work as governor to expanding opportunities for all Nevadans. From strengthening our public education, to defending reproductive rights, expanding voting access, and signing a public health insurance option into law — I’ve been committed to fighting for progress since Day One. And this year will be no different. 2022 marks a new chapter for this team as we prepare to defend our legislative wins from my 6 Republican opponents and continue to push for progress in the Silver State. With all that lies ahead, I’m hoping I can count on each and every one of you to support our efforts. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for everything, Steve Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. Box 850 Las Vegas, NV 89125 mailto:info@stevesisolak.com | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Sisolak for Nevada, please .
